name: How to Post a Photo in Google My Business Profile Of My Interior Design
description: Ever had trouble figuring out how you can add a photo on google maps of your business? This step-by-step guide will show you how.
main_title: How to Post Photo in Google My Business Profile
richtext:
Have you ever wondered how you can add an interior photo to Google Maps or Google My Business? It’s super easy, and your photo can provide customers insight about how your establishment looks like.

Step 1:

To get started, visit the Google My Business website and sign into your account.

Step 2:

On the “Home” pane of your business listing, scroll down until you see a “Manage Photos” button. Click that to get to the Photos pane. You can alternatively click on the Photos button on the left sidebar to get to this window.

Step 3:

You will see a row of options for sharing photos for different uses on the top of the screen. Choose the “Interior” heading and then click the blue “+” button to start posting a photo. You can click on the blue “Post photos” button to achieve the same thing.

Step 4:

Choose your photo. Either drag and drop a photo or select one from your computer to do this.

Step 5:

Once you have it uploaded, you’re good to go! If you want to delete the image, you can click on the photo and then click the white bin button.

That’s all there is to it. Enjoy your company’s polished appearance on Google!
join_title: Efficiently manage your Google My Business listing along with all your other business listings with Synup!
join_description: Manage your GMB listing along with other business listings from Synup’s local marketing dashboard. Create listings, update them and manage your online presence from one place!
